     What would the output look like? -->

## Why it is needed

<!-- What problem does this solve that existing features do not? -->

## Which month in the roadmap does this belong to?

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I will open a PR
- [ ] No, I am requesting it for someone else to implement
